Flagged and blocked from publication. v3.0 marketing gate items (#893, #895) have no progress.

blockers.description: marketing-content-agent blocked by governance catch-22 (#995): hook blocks ALL tool execution before kernel is installed. Now in 4th consecutive cycle.
blockers.impact: Complete content pipeline paralysis — zero agent output, content calendar dark
blockers.requiredAction: Ops must either: (1) bootstrap kernel in worktree manually, or (2) update hook to allow pnpm install before kernel check

contentAccuracyFlags.description: Weekly content pack Monday post claims four supported agents (Claude Code, Codex CLI, GitHub Copilot, Gemini CLI). Actual shipped adapters: claude-code and copilot-cli only. OpenCode PR #1109 is open. No Codex or Gemini adapters exist.
contentAccuracyFlags.action: Blocked from publication. marketing-content-agent must revise when unblocked.

contentAccuracyFlags.description: v3.0 messaging framework cites 22 invariants — actual is 24.

escalations: CRITICAL: Content agents silent for 4 consecutive cycles. #995 (governance catch-22) is unresolved. Ops must intervene or content pipeline stays dark.
HIGH: Weekly content pack #1074 contains false product claims (Codex CLI, Gemini CLI). Flagged and blocked. If published unchecked it would damage credibility.
MEDIUM: #934 (v2.7.x announcement) is now behind — v2.8.2 is current. Content agent should pivot to v2.8.x announcement when unblocked.
MEDIUM: v3.0 marketing gate (#893 demo video, #894 site update, #895 launch post) has zero progress. Demo video is the #1 conversion asset — needs a human to record it.
productInsights: Capture funnel shipped (ea98043) — hero CTA, early access section, footer link. First conversion mechanism live on site.
v2.8.0 multi-driver story is strong but not yet true: only 2 adapters shipped. OpenCode (#1109) would make it 3. Codex/Gemini require new engineering work.
24 invariants (up from 22) is a meaningful milestone — OWASP blog (#925) should lead with this number.
OpenCode adapter PR #1109 has 2 failing CI checks — worth monitoring; when merged, update content to 3 supported agents.

dogfoodReport.notes: No governance denials encountered during EM run. Content agent blockers are pre-governance (catch-22 prevents any execution).
